title: Jamaican Chicken Kebabs
description: Grilled Jamaican chicken kebabs with a hint of spice, perfect for a summer evening. This recipe combines the flavors of Jamaica with tender chicken and a sweet and tangy glaze.
instructions: Thread chicken and vegetables onto kebabs.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, ginger, and jerk seasoning.
Brush the mixture onto the chicken and vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve hot with your favorite sides.
Let kebabs rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
